_comment: Pinned hashes for the QC precomputed-predictions parity fixture (GBM + SP500-universe, AAPL anchor). See docs/references/quantconnect-precomputed-predictions.md and tests/fixtures/golden/qc-precomputed-predictions/attribution.md for context. run_ledger_prediction_set_hash equals prediction_set_hash by design — the runner threads the manifest's top-level hash unchanged.
